# Simple Table

| Name  | Age |
| ----- | --- |
| Alice | 30  |
| Bob   | 25  |

# Left Aligned Table

| Name       | Department  |
| :--------- | :---------- |
| John Doe   | Engineering |
| Jane Smith | Design      |

# Center Aligned Table

|    Name    | Department  |
| :--------: | :---------: |
|  John Doe  | Engineering |
| Jane Smith |   Design    |

# Right Aligned Table

|       Name |   Salary |
| ---------: | -------: |
|   John Doe |   $1,200 |
| Jane Smith | $120,000 |

# Mixed Alignment Table

| Name       | Department  |   Salary |
| :--------- | :---------: | -------: |
| John Doe   | Engineering |   $1,200 |
| Jane Smith |   Design    | $120,000 |

# Default Alignment Table

| Name       | Department  | Salary   |
| ---------- | ----------- | -------- |
| John Doe   | Engineering | $120,000 |
| Jane Smith | Design      | $110,000 |
